zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Meinill於大約1205年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Robert de Meinill27歲，母親Emma de Malbisse22歲。他於大約1230年與Sibilla de Aslakby在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1269年7月16日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Meinill于大约1205年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲Robert de Meinill27岁，母亲Emma de Malbisse22岁。他于大约1230年与Sibilla de Aslakby在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1269年7月16日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Meinill was born about 1205, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Meinill, was 27 and his mother, Emma de Malbisse, was 22. He married Sibilla de Aslakby about 1230, in Whorlton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 16 July 1269, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Meinill est né environ 1205, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Meinill, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma de Malbisse, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sibilla de Aslakby environ 1230, à Whorlton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 16 juillet 1269, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Meinill um 1205 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Meinill 27 und seine Mutter Emma de Malbisse 22. Er hat um 1230 in Whorlton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sibilla de Aslakby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 16. Juli 1269 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Meinill è nato il circa 1205 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Meinill, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Malbisse, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sibilla de Aslakby circa 1230, nel Whorlton, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 16 luglio 1269, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Meinillが約1205年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Meinillは27歳，母Emma de Malbisseは22歳であった。約1230年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでSibilla de Aslakbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1269年7月16日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Meinill(이)가 대략 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Meinill(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Malbisse(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Sibilla de Aslakby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1269년 7월 16일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Meinill nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Meinill, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Malbisse, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibilla de Aslakby aproximadamente 1230, em Whorlton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 16 de julho de 1269, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Meinill родился около 1205 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Meinill было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Malbisse, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla de Aslakby около 1230 г. в местности уаурлтон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 16 июля 1269 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen de Meinill nació aproximadamente 1205, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Meinill, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Emma de Malbisse, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sibilla de Aslakby aproximadamente 1230, en Whorlton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 16 de julio de 1269, en su pueblo.
